description:
Verso (original use): Letter, maybe official state correspondence. Begins "ʿaraḍa hādhihi l-[...]...." Mentions Jaʿfar b. Fattāh(?). Ends in the margin with a ṣalwala.

Recto (secondary use): Official-looking receipt for a sum of 4 dinars for Abū Najm(?) ʿAlī for the year 516 AH. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
